positive: A vibrant, symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized constellations, celestial spheres, and abstract mythological creatures like griffins and phoenixes. The color palette should be deep sapphire blues, shimmering gold leaf accents, and touches of iridescent teal. Use clean linework and strong, geometric silhouettes, giving it an ethereal, tattoo-style graphic novel quality. The composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a wearable art piece. Highly detailed, maximalist composition, flat vector look with subtle depth, printed on a smooth white background.
negative: blur, low detail, watermark, text, logos, signatures, artifacts, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, gradient fade, bokeh, writing, cropped, messy
